testcase.name: test_pincode_lookup

failure.message: AssertionError: /api/pincode/416001 returned 404 body={"detail":"Not Found"} — ingress is routing /api/* to FastAPI, but this is a Next.js app. All API calls broken. assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:70: in test_pincode_lookup assert r.status_code == 200, ( E AssertionError: /api/pincode/416001 returned 404 body={"detail":"Not Found"} — ingress is routing /api/* to FastAPI, but this is a Next.js app. All API calls broken. E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_track_missing_params_returns_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:81: in test_track_missing_params_returns_400 assert r.status_code == 400, ( E AssertionError: /api/track expected 400 got 404 body={"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 400 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_contact_submit
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:95: in test_contact_submit assert r.status_code in (200, 201), ( E AssertionError: /api/contact returned 404 body={"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in (200, 201) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_orders_create_cod_fallback

skipped.message: Requires seeded variant id lookup via Supabase — see UI test
